LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JUAN F. ORIAS, JR., RN'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2011 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 302. STAY WILL REMAIN IN PLACE UNTIL THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: JOANNE FARRELL, CSR #4838

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JUAN F. ORIAS, RN'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. STAY REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL COURT'S DECISION. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW OF THE ENTIRE RECORD OF EVIDENCE PRESENTED BEFORE THE ALJ. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THE FINDINGS OF THE ALJ UNDER A CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE STANDARD. THE COURT THEREFORE GRANTS PETITIONER'S WRIT AND ORDERS THE BUREAU OF REGISTERED NURSING TO VACATE THE DECISION AND ORDER REVOKING PETITIONER'S LICENSE. PETITIONER TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing Re: Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Jun-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER JUAN F. ORIAS, RN'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT.

APPEARANCES: Mitchell J. Green, Esq. of Law Offices of Curtis & Green 456-4600 for petitioner & moving party; Judith Loach, Deputy Atty General 703-5604 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Stay remains in effect until Court's decision.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW OF THE ENTIRE RECORD OF EVIDENCE PRESENTED BEFORE THE ALJ. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THE FINDINGS OF THE ALJ UNDER A CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE STANDARD. THE COURT THEREFORE GRANTS PETITIONER'S WRIT AND ORDERS THE BUREAU OF REGISTERED NURSING TO VACATE THE DECISION AND ORDER REVOKING PETITIONER'S LICENSE. PETITIONER TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Hearing Re: Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PETITIONER JUAN ORIAS' Notice Of Hearing Re: Administrative Writ. MATTER TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE GIORGI PER CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE BUSCH. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing Re: Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Continued To Jun-17-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER JUAN F. ORIAS, JR., RN'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2011. STAY WILL REMAIN IN PLACE UNTIL THE NEW HEARING DATE. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838

Ntc Of Motion For Order Staying License Revocation Order
Off Calendar Mar-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER JUAN F. ORIAS, RN MOTION FOR ORDER STAYING LICENSE REVOCATION ORDER.

APPEARANCES: Mitchell J. Green, Esq. & Ryan Hughes, Esq of Law Offices of Curtis & Green 456-4600 for petitioner & moving party; Judith Loach, Deputy Atty General 703-5604 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: GRANTED. REVOCATION OF PETITIONER'S LICENSE IS STAYED until 06/10/11. Petitioner to file opening brief by 05/03/11. Opposition due by 05/24/11. Reply due by 05/31/11. Petitioner will file motion and set hearing date in early June (after conferring with counsel on a mutual agreeable date). (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
